scenario_name: auto halts in MEDIUM band regardless of --allow (AB-57-2 oracle)
ab_57_rationale: AB-57-1 risk_level local_mutate in permitted set AND risk_level <= allow (both local_mutate); BUT AB-57-2 MEDIUM band (0.65 < 0.80 HIGH threshold) -> HOLD regardless of --allow. Additionally only 1/3 primary signals present (would also trigger thin-HIGH degradation if confidence were >=0.80).
